Finding ID: PERF-001
Specialist: Performance Analyst
Severity: Important
Confidence: High
File: src/auth/login.py
Lines: 42-58
Title: N+1 query pattern in user search
Evidence: The search function issues a separate database query for each result in the loop at line 50, causing O(N) queries instead of a single batch query.
Impact chain: Each search result triggers separate query → O(N) database round-trips → degraded response time under load
Recommended fix: Batch the user lookups into a single query using an IN clause.
